ai_summary: Ahluwalia Contracts (India) Limited reported significant revenue growth for 4QFY2020 and FY2020, yet experienced a drastic ~80% decline in Q4 PAT and ~45% for the full year, driven by severe margin erosion. Material impacts include Rs.42 Crores in doubtful debt write-offs, high fixed overheads remaining constant during COVID-19 related operational slowdowns, and current labor availability at only 25% of pre-COVID levels severely hampering execution. Management expressed high uncertainty regarding future margins and recovery given the evolving situation and lack of definitive client compensation for project delays, signaling potential continued pressure.
